TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog5__awi_ a basi_
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kita'en koSa'en ka manabih ka inoka a takem a.
S.PHON: kitaʔən koʃaʔən ka manaβih ka inoka a takəm a.
S.FORM: kita'en koSa'en ka manabih ka inoka a takem a.
S.PHON: kitaʔən koʃaʔən ka manaβih ka inoka a takəm a.
S.TRANSL: 我要說關於一隻青蛙的故事.
"I will tell a story about a frog."

S.FORM: kinbazaen hini 'aehae' koSa'en ka a korkoring 'aehoe' 'aehae'.
S.PHON: kinβaz~ðæn hini ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka a korkoriŋ ʔæhœʔ ʔæhæʔ.
S.FORM: kinbazaen hini 'aehae' koSa'en ka a korkoring 'aehoe' 'aehae'.
S.PHON: kinβaz~ðæn hini ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka a korkoriŋ ʔæhœʔ ʔæhæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 這個故事是關於一隻狗和一個小孩.
"This story about a child and a dog."

S.FORM: a rakepen takem.
S.PHON: a rakəpən takəm.
S.FORM: a rakepen takem.
S.PHON: a rakəpən takəm.

S.FORM: lobih ray a taew'an.
S.PHON: loβih raj a tæwʔan.
S.FORM: lobih ray a taew'an.
S.PHON: loβih raj a tæwʔan.

S.FORM: sepanen ray tabai.
S.PHON: s~θəpanən raj taβai.
S.FORM: sepanen ray tabai.
S.PHON: s~θəpanən raj taβai.

TRANSL.notes: "(They) kept it in a jar to raise."

S.TRANSL: " kept it in a jar to raise."

S.FORM: hayza' mwai' isaa 'aehae' hahila.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ mwaiʔ is~θaa ʔæhæʔ hahila.
S.FORM: hayza' mwai' isaa 'aehae' hahila.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ mwaiʔ is~θaa ʔæhæʔ hahila.

S.FORM: koSa'en ka a takem raiw ila.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ka a takəm raiw ila.
S.FORM: koSa'en ka a takem raiw ila.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ka a takəm raiw ila.

S.FORM: korkoring haysia ma'rem ray a halapaw.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hajs~θia maʔrəm raj a halapaw.
S.FORM: korkoring haysia ma'rem ray a halapaw.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hajs~θia maʔrəm raj a halapaw.
S.TRANSL: "The child was still asleep on his bed."

S.FORM: raiw ila ka a takem.
S.PHON: raiw ila ka a takəm.
S.FORM: raiw ila ka a takem.
S.PHON: raiw ila ka a takəm.

S.FORM: hini korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma a kiim ila.
S.PHON: hini korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ ma a kiim ila.
S.FORM: hini korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma a kiim ila.
S.PHON: hini korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ ma a kiim ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗跑去找那隻青蛙.
"The child and the dog went to look for the frog."

S.FORM: kiim ilakano' 'inoka' ila ray atabai koSa'en sinpanan.
S.PHON: kiim ilakanoʔ ʔinokaʔ ila raj ataβai koʃaʔən s~θinpanan.
S.FORM: kiim ilakano' 'inoka' ila ray atabai koSa'en sinpanan.
S.PHON: kiim ilakanoʔ ʔinokaʔ ila raj ataβai koʃaʔən s~θinpanan.
S.TRANSL: 他們找原來在甕裡的青蛙.
"They looked for the frog which was in the jar."

S.FORM: mwai' 'am kiim.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔam kiim.
S.FORM: mwai' 'am kiim.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔam kiim.
S.TRANSL: "The boy came to look for the frog."

S.FORM: e noka a korkoring panpanibih ila ray a kakrangi'an.
S.PHON: ə noka a korkoriŋ panpaniβih ila raj a kakraŋiʔan.
S.FORM: e noka a korkoring panpanibih ila ray a kakrangi'an.
S.PHON: ə noka a korkoriŋ panpaniβih ila raj a kakraŋiʔan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在他的東西之間四處翻找.

S.FORM: koSa'en ka haehoeway sipan'oe'ong ma' a 'oka' i kita'i.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ka hæhœwaj s~θipanʔœʔoŋ maʔ a ʔokaʔ i kitaʔi.
S.FORM: koSa'en ka haehoeway sipan'oe'ong ma' a 'oka' i kita'i.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ka hæhœwaj s~θipanʔœʔoŋ maʔ a ʔokaʔ i kitaʔi.
S.TRANSL: 小孩把他的鞋倒過來,但是找不到青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: "The child turned his shoes upside down, but he couldn't find (the frog)."

S.TRANSL: "The child turned his shoes upside down, but he couldn't find ."

S.FORM: a noka ahoe' ray tabai kiimin ma' 'oka'.
S.PHON: a noka ahœʔ raj taβai kiimin maʔ ʔokaʔ.
S.FORM: a noka ahoe' ray tabai kiimin ma' 'oka'.
S.PHON: a noka ahœʔ raj taβai kiimin maʔ ʔokaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗找甕的裡面,青蛙不在那裡.
"The dog looked inside the jar. The frog was not there too."

S.FORM: ra hini' 'aehae' korkoring kosaen ray hinoehas.
S.PHON: ra hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ kos~θæn raj hinœhas~θ.
S.FORM: ra hini' 'aehae' korkoring kosaen ray hinoehas.
S.PHON: ra hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ kos~θæn raj hinœhas~θ.

S.FORM: ilahao latar si'oe'oe ila.
S.PHON: ilahao latar s~θiʔœʔœ ila.
S.FORM: ilahao latar si'oe'oe ila.
S.PHON: ilahao latar s~θiʔœʔœ ila.

S.FORM: si'oe'oe no'ano' a takem 'am raam ay koSa'en ka 'a 'oe'oewan o.
S.PHON: s~θiʔœʔœ noʔanoʔ a takəm ʔam raam aj koʃaʔən ka ʔa ʔœʔœwan o.
S.FORM: si'oe'oe no'ano' a takem 'am raam ay koSa'en ka 'a 'oe'oewan o.
S.PHON: s~θiʔœʔœ noʔanoʔ a takəm ʔam raam aj koʃaʔən ka ʔa ʔœʔœwan o.

TRANSL.notes: 青蛙認不認得那個聲音(在叫牠)?

S.TRANSL: 青蛙認不認得那個聲音 ?

TRANSL.notes: "Would the frog know the sound (calling it)?"

S.FORM: 'inokay mwai' a si'oe'oe isahini 'aehae' koSa'en ka 'aehoe' twa'is kikozah ray tabai.
S.PHON: ʔinokaj mwaiʔ a s~θiʔœʔœ is~θahini ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka ʔæhœʔ twaʔis~θ kikoz~ðah raj taβai.
S.FORM: 'inokay mwai' a si'oe'oe isahini 'aehae' koSa'en ka 'aehoe' twa'is kikozah ray tabai.
S.PHON: ʔinokaj mwaiʔ a s~θiʔœʔœ is~θahini ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka ʔæhœʔ twaʔis~θ kikoz~ðah raj taβai.
S.TRANSL: 小狗用力往甕裡 去.
"The dog forced itself toward the jar."

S.FORM: o noka 'aehoe' a ta'oeloeh sikosiza ila o ray tabai 'izo'.
S.PHON: o noka ʔæhœʔ a taʔœlœh s~θikos~θiz~ða ila o raj taβai ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: o noka 'aehoe' a ta'oeloeh sikosiza ila o ray tabai 'izo'.
S.PHON: o noka ʔæhœʔ a taʔœlœh s~θikos~θiz~ða ila o raj taβai ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: "The dog inserted its head into the jar."

S.FORM: moiti' kiim ila hini.
S.PHON: moitiʔ kiim ila hini.
S.FORM: moiti' kiim ila hini.
S.PHON: moitiʔ kiim ila hini.
S.TRANSL: 狗讓自己進到甕裡面找青蛙.
"The dog got itself into the jar to look for the frog there."

S.FORM: 'aehoe' noka a korkoring isaa ma 'aewpoe'oen ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ noka a korkoriŋ is~θaa ma ʔæwpœʔœn ila.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' noka a korkoring isaa ma 'aewpoe'oen ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ noka a korkoriŋ is~θaa ma ʔæwpœʔœn ila.

S.FORM: 'aewpoe'oen ma 'ima koSa.
S.PHON: ʔæwpœʔœn ma ʔima koʃa.
S.FORM: 'aewpoe'oen ma 'ima koSa.
S.PHON: ʔæwpœʔœn ma ʔima koʃa.

S.FORM: a taila takiim.
S.PHON: a taila takiim.
S.FORM: a taila takiim.
S.PHON: a taila takiim.
S.TRANSL: "Let's go and look for the frog."

S.FORM: ilahao latar ray 'oeS'oeSoe'an a.
S.PHON: ilahao latar raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan a.
S.FORM: ilahao latar ray 'oeS'oeSoe'an a.
S.PHON: ilahao latar raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan a.
S.TRANSL: 他們出去到草原上找青蛙.
"They went out to the grasses to look for the frog."

S.FORM: a takem 'am mwai' 'am mwai' taew'an langi' si'oe'oe.
S.PHON: a takəm ʔam mwaiʔ ʔam mwaiʔ tæwʔan laŋiʔ s~θiʔœʔœ.
S.FORM: a takem 'am mwai' 'am mwai' taew'an langi' si'oe'oe.
S.PHON: a takəm ʔam mwaiʔ ʔam mwaiʔ tæwʔan laŋiʔ s~θiʔœʔœ.
S.TRANSL: 孩子跑出去房子外面叫.
"The boy went out of the house and called."

S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' hinghae'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ maʔ hiŋhæʔ.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' hinghae'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ maʔ hiŋhæʔ.

S.FORM: hini o hinkosizah ila ray kaehkaehoeyan towa'isin si'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hini o hinkos~θiz~ðah ila raj kæhkæhœjan towaʔis~θin s~θiʔœʔœ.
S.FORM: hini o hinkosizah ila ray kaehkaehoeyan towa'isin si'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hini o hinkos~θiz~ðah ila raj kæhkæhœjan towaʔis~θin s~θiʔœʔœ.
S.TRANSL: "They went into the woods and kept on calling."

S.FORM: si'oe'oe ma' 'oka' i kita'i.
S.PHON: s~θiʔœʔœ maʔ ʔokaʔ i kitaʔi.
S.FORM: si'oe'oe ma' 'oka' i kita'i.
S.PHON: s~θiʔœʔœ maʔ ʔokaʔ i kitaʔi.
S.TRANSL: 他們叫啊叫,但是沒有看到青蛙出來.
"They called and called but did not see the frog come out."

S.FORM: kas'oehaz sa'oewaz XXXX korkoring mwai' ray hoeroe a noka 'aewhaes a.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð s~θaʔœwaz~ð **** korkoriŋ mwaiʔ raj hœrœ a noka ʔæwhæs~θ a.
S.FORM: kas'oehaz sa'oewaz XXXX korkoring mwai' ray hoeroe a noka 'aewhaes a.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð s~θaʔœwaz~ð **** korkoriŋ mwaiʔ raj hœrœ a noka ʔæwhæs~θ a.
S.TRANSL: "The boy came to the mouse hole."

S.FORM: isaza ray hoeroe' si'oe'oe.
S.PHON: is~θaz~ða raj hœrœʔ s~θiʔœʔœ.
S.FORM: isaza ray hoeroe' si'oe'oe.
S.PHON: is~θaz~ða raj hœrœʔ s~θiʔœʔœ.

S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' sahoeroe sahoeroe boya'.
S.PHON: ka ʔæhœʔ s~θahœrœ s~θahœrœ βojaʔ.
S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' sahoeroe sahoeroe boya'.
S.PHON: ka ʔæhœʔ s~θahœrœ s~θahœrœ βojaʔ.

S.FORM: isaa tbong nakhini koSa'en ka a boya'.
S.PHON: is~θaa tβoŋ nakhini koʃaʔən ka a βojaʔ.
S.FORM: isaa tbong nakhini koSa'en ka a boya'.
S.PHON: is~θaa tβoŋ nakhini koʃaʔən ka a βojaʔ.

S.FORM: si'oe'oe si'oe'oe noka korkoring.
S.PHON: s~θiʔœʔœ s~θiʔœʔœ noka korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: si'oe'oe si'oe'oe noka korkoring.
S.PHON: s~θiʔœʔœ s~θiʔœʔœ noka korkoriŋ.

S.FORM: kas'oehaz kitaen mwai' ka 'aewhaes.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð kitæn mwaiʔ ka ʔæwhæs~θ.
S.FORM: kas'oehaz kitaen mwai' ka 'aewhaes.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð kitæn mwaiʔ ka ʔæwhæs~θ.

S.FORM: ra ka korkoring nakhara ila homses sowiti'.
S.PHON: ra ka korkoriŋ nakhara ila homs~θəs~θ s~θowitiʔ.
S.FORM: ra ka korkoring nakhara ila homses sowiti'.
S.PHON: ra ka korkoriŋ nakhara ila homs~θəs~θ s~θowitiʔ.

S.FORM: hini ka 'aehoe' 'ima hahlihin ka a kaehoey.
S.PHON: hini ka ʔæhœʔ ʔima hahlihin ka a kæhœj.
S.FORM: hini ka 'aehoe' 'ima hahlihin ka a kaehoey.
S.PHON: hini ka ʔæhœʔ ʔima hahlihin ka a kæhœj.
S.TRANSL: "The dog was pushing and shaking the tree."

S.FORM: isahiza ka boya' paksahae'en ray rai' ka'ina'an hayap.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða ka βojaʔ paks~θahæʔən raj raiʔ kaʔinaʔan hajap.
S.FORM: isahiza ka boya' paksahae'en ray rai' ka'ina'an hayap.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða ka βojaʔ paks~θahæʔən raj raiʔ kaʔinaʔan hajap.
S.TRANSL: 那些掉在地上的蜂飛走了.
"The bees falling on the ground flew away."

S.FORM: 'akoy 'atomalan.
S.PHON: ʔakoj ʔatomalan.
S.FORM: 'akoy 'atomalan.
S.PHON: ʔakoj ʔatomalan.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aewhaes kas'oehaz payrarongaw.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæwhæs~θ kas~θʔœhaz~ð pajraroŋaw.
S.FORM: hini' ka 'aewhaes kas'oehaz payrarongaw.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæwhæs~θ kas~θʔœhaz~ð pajraroŋaw.

S.FORM: o korkoring 'akmiim ka takem noka komoSa ray kaehoey babaw.
S.PHON: o korkoriŋ ʔakmiim ka takəm noka komoʃa raj kæhœj βaβaw.
S.FORM: o korkoring 'akmiim ka takem noka komoSa ray kaehoey babaw.
S.PHON: o korkoriŋ ʔakmiim ka takəm noka komoʃa raj kæhœj βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: "The child looked for the frog up the tree."

S.FORM: hayza nak 'osa'an ka a roroo'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða nak ʔos~θaʔan ka a rorooʔ.
S.FORM: hayza nak 'osa'an ka a roroo'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða nak ʔos~θaʔan ka a rorooʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 有東西進去(樹上)腐壞的樹洞.

S.TRANSL: 有東西進去 腐壞的樹洞.

S.FORM: rima' payrarongaw ray a roroo'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ pajraroŋaw raj a rorooʔ.
S.FORM: rima' payrarongaw ray a roroo'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ pajraroŋaw raj a rorooʔ.
S.TRANSL: "He went to peek inside the hole."

S.FORM: kita' si'oe'oei.
S.PHON: kitaʔ s~θiʔœʔœi.
S.FORM: kita' si'oe'oei.
S.PHON: kitaʔ s~θiʔœʔœi.

S.FORM: hiza ray a roroo' 'izo' mina kano'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða raj a rorooʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ mina kanoʔ.
S.FORM: hiza ray a roroo' 'izo' mina kano'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða raj a rorooʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ mina kanoʔ.

S.FORM: ka kal'oe kal'oe kas'oehaz.
S.PHON: ka kalʔœ kalʔœ kas~θʔœhaz~ð.
S.FORM: ka kal'oe kal'oe kas'oehaz.
S.PHON: ka kalʔœ kalʔœ kas~θʔœhaz~ð.

S.FORM: ka hiza korkoring homses.
S.PHON: ka hiz~ða korkoriŋ homs~θəs~θ.
S.FORM: ka hiza korkoring homses.
S.PHON: ka hiz~ða korkoriŋ homs~θəs~θ.

S.FORM: sahae' ila hani ray rai'.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ ila hani raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: sahae' ila hani ray rai'.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ ila hani raj raiʔ.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' 'ima a raiw hino boya'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ʔima a raiw hino βojaʔ.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' 'ima a raiw hino boya'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ʔima a raiw hino βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: "The dog ran away from the bees chasing it."

S.FORM: sowawon ma isa may isason ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.PHON: s~θowawon ma is~θa maj is~θas~θon raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.
S.FORM: sowawon ma isa may isason ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.PHON: s~θowawon ma is~θa maj is~θas~θon raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們跑著離開經過那棵樹.
"They ran away passing under the tree."

S.FORM: ma raiw nokosizah ila o ray 'ima raawaSen sowiti.
S.PHON: ma raiw nokos~θiz~ðah ila o raj ʔima raawaʃən s~θowiti.
S.FORM: ma raiw nokosizah ila o ray 'ima raawaSen sowiti.
S.PHON: ma raiw nokos~θiz~ðah ila o raj ʔima raawaʃən s~θowiti.
S.TRANSL: 當他們已經跑得很遠了,

S.FORM: 'am mwai' nak hini.
S.PHON: ʔam mwaiʔ nak hini.
S.FORM: 'am mwai' nak hini.
S.PHON: ʔam mwaiʔ nak hini.

S.FORM: ka a korkoring min'itol ila miririi'.
S.PHON: ka a korkoriŋ minʔitol ila miririiʔ.
S.FORM: ka a korkoring min'itol ila miririi'.
S.PHON: ka a korkoriŋ minʔitol ila miririiʔ.

S.FORM: hiza ka kal'oe hayap.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka kalʔœ hajap.
S.FORM: hiza ka kal'oe hayap.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka kalʔœ hajap.

S.FORM: nakhara iya kosa' kinoring ka a korkoring.
S.PHON: nakhara ija kos~θaʔ kinoriŋ ka a korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: nakhara iya kosa' kinoring ka a korkoring.
S.PHON: nakhara ija kos~θaʔ kinoriŋ ka a korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: 好像是牠在攻擊那個小孩.
"It seemed like it's attacking the child."

S.FORM: sa'oewaz korkoring ma' tikot 'atomalan.
S.PHON: s~θaʔœwaz~ð korkoriŋ maʔ tikot ʔatomalan.
S.FORM: sa'oewaz korkoring ma' tikot 'atomalan.
S.PHON: s~θaʔœwaz~ð korkoriŋ maʔ tikot ʔatomalan.

S.FORM: tay'itol a ray ka bato' babaw 'oe'oe nakhini koSa'en ka a takem.
S.PHON: tajʔitol a raj ka βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ nakhini koʃaʔən ka a takəm.
S.FORM: tay'itol a ray ka bato' babaw 'oe'oe nakhini koSa'en ka a takem.
S.PHON: tajʔitol a raj ka βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ nakhini koʃaʔən ka a takəm.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬到石頭上面叫青蛙.
"The child climbed on top of the rock calling the frog."

S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' isaa maStaba ila ray a bato' langi.
S.PHON: ka ʔæhœʔ is~θaa maʃtaβa ila raj a βatoʔ laŋi.
S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' isaa maStaba ila ray a bato' langi.
S.PHON: ka ʔæhœʔ is~θaa maʃtaβa ila raj a βatoʔ laŋi.
S.TRANSL: "The dog lay down beside the rock."

S.FORM: may isaa tilhaehael hiya' a kiim ka a takem sa'oewaz.
S.PHON: maj is~θaa tilhæhæl hijaʔ a kiim ka a takəm s~θaʔœwaz~ð.
S.FORM: may isaa tilhaehael hiya' a kiim ka a takem sa'oewaz.
S.PHON: maj is~θaa tilhæhæl hijaʔ a kiim ka a takəm s~θaʔœwaz~ð.
S.TRANSL: "Who passed by there to look for the frog?"

S.FORM: sa mwai' rini ray a bato' babaw.
S.PHON: s~θa mwaiʔ rini raj a βatoʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: sa mwai' rini ray a bato' babaw.
S.PHON: s~θa mwaiʔ rini raj a βatoʔ βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: "And came on top of the rock."

S.FORM: kas'oehaz 'aehae' nakhini koSa'en ka a wae'ae'.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð ʔæhæʔ nakhini koʃaʔən ka a wæʔæʔ.
S.FORM: kas'oehaz 'aehae' nakhini koSa'en ka a wae'ae'.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð ʔæhæʔ nakhini koʃaʔən ka a wæʔæʔ.

S.FORM: a wae'ae' isahiza ka a korkoring ma' pahangal ila noka a wae'ae'.
S.PHON: a wæʔæʔ is~θahiz~ða ka a korkoriŋ maʔ pahaŋal ila noka a wæʔæʔ.
S.FORM: a wae'ae' isahiza ka a korkoring ma' pahangal ila noka a wae'ae'.
S.PHON: a wæʔæʔ is~θahiz~ða ka a korkoriŋ maʔ pahaŋal ila noka a wæʔæʔ.

S.FORM: rima' wae'ae kah'oeng hiza pahalay.
S.PHON: rimaʔ wæʔæ kahʔœŋ hiz~ða pahalaj.
S.FORM: rima' wae'ae kah'oeng hiza pahalay.
S.PHON: rimaʔ wæʔæ kahʔœŋ hiz~ða pahalaj.

S.FORM: 'ima noka 'aehoe' a sia sowaw.
S.PHON: ʔima noka ʔæhœʔ a s~θia s~θowaw.
S.FORM: 'ima noka 'aehoe' a sia sowaw.
S.PHON: ʔima noka ʔæhœʔ a s~θia s~θowaw.

S.FORM: isahiza wae'ae' 'ae'aeaew ila ila hiza ray 'ima mwahil.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða wæʔæʔ ʔæʔææw ila ila hiz~ða raj ʔima mwahil.
S.FORM: isahiza wae'ae' 'ae'aeaew ila ila hiza ray 'ima mwahil.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða wæʔæʔ ʔæʔææw ila ila hiz~ða raj ʔima mwahil.
S.TRANSL: 鹿朝著一個寬闊的地方跑去.
"The deer ran away toward a spacious area there."

S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' hinghae' sowaw 'oyae' mwai' ila ray iniya a ka'siyap.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ maʔ hiŋhæʔ s~θowaw ʔojæʔ mwaiʔ ila raj inija a kaʔs~θijap.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' hinghae' sowaw 'oyae' mwai' ila ray iniya a ka'siyap.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ maʔ hiŋhæʔ s~θowaw ʔojæʔ mwaiʔ ila raj inija a kaʔs~θijap.
S.TRANSL: "The dog also chased along and came to a cliff."

W.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數排除予格

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數排除予格

S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' sahae' ila.
S.PHON: ka ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila.
S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' sahae' ila.
S.PHON: ka ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila.

S.FORM: ka wae'ae' si'intani'.
S.PHON: ka wæʔæʔ s~θiʔintaniʔ.
S.FORM: ka wae'ae' si'intani'.
S.PHON: ka wæʔæʔ s~θiʔintaniʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 鹿停下來 (並且避免狗跳上去).
"The deer stopped (and prevented the dog from bumping into it)."

S.FORM: hiza ka a korkoring ma' sahae' ila sa'oewaz sahae' ila isaa o ray 'ima 'izo' ka hinolaong(an).
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka a korkoriŋ maʔ s~θahæʔ ila s~θaʔœwaz~ð s~θahæʔ ila is~θaa o raj ʔima ʔiz~ðoʔ ka hinolaoŋ(an).
S.FORM: hiza ka a korkoring ma' sahae' ila sa'oewaz sahae' ila isaa o ray 'ima 'izo' ka hinolaong(an).
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka a korkoriŋ maʔ s~θahæʔ ila s~θaʔœwaz~ð s~θahæʔ ila is~θaa o raj ʔima ʔiz~ðoʔ ka hinolaoŋ(an).
S.TRANSL: "The child also fell into a shady spot."

S.FORM: 'inaray hinolaw langi hayza ka kaehoey sa korkoring sahae' ila ila haw ray hinolaong(an) ki ahoe'.
S.PHON: ʔinaraj hinolaw laŋi hajz~ða ka kæhœj s~θa korkoriŋ s~θahæʔ ila ila haw raj hinolaoŋ(an) ki ahœʔ.
S.FORM: 'inaray hinolaw langi hayza ka kaehoey sa korkoring sahae' ila ila haw ray hinolaong(an) ki ahoe'.
S.PHON: ʔinaraj hinolaw laŋi hajz~ða ka kæhœj s~θa korkoriŋ s~θahæʔ ila ila haw raj hinolaoŋ(an) ki ahœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和他的狗一起掉下去到蔭涼處.
"The child fell into a shady area together with his dog."

S.FORM: wae'ae' 'inaray babaw ma a sazeez kitkita' sa'oewaz nakhini kosaen ka.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ ʔinaraj βaβaw ma a s~θaz~ðəəz~ð kitkitaʔ s~θaʔœwaz~ð nakhini kos~θæn ka.
S.FORM: wae'ae' 'inaray babaw ma a sazeez kitkita' sa'oewaz nakhini kosaen ka.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ ʔinaraj βaβaw ma a s~θaz~ðəəz~ð kitkitaʔ s~θaʔœwaz~ð nakhini kos~θæn ka.
S.TRANSL: "The deer looked carefully from the top."

S.FORM: a korkoring ki e 'aehoe' hiza korkoring raam ma' a lalangoy.
S.PHON: a korkoriŋ ki ə ʔæhœʔ hiz~ða korkoriŋ raam maʔ a lalaŋoj.
S.FORM: a korkoring ki e 'aehoe' hiza korkoring raam ma' a lalangoy.
S.PHON: a korkoriŋ ki ə ʔæhœʔ hiz~ða korkoriŋ raam maʔ a lalaŋoj.
S.TRANSL: "The child and the dog knew how to swim."

S.FORM: ma masaeng isaa 'aehoe' may isaa ta'itol ila ray a korkoring a ka a a'baa' babaw sa'oewaz.
S.PHON: ma mas~θæŋ is~θaa ʔæhœʔ maj is~θaa taʔitol ila raj a korkoriŋ a ka a aʔβaaʔ βaβaw s~θaʔœwaz~ð.
S.FORM: ma masaeng isaa 'aehoe' may isaa ta'itol ila ray a korkoring a ka a a'baa' babaw sa'oewaz.
S.PHON: ma mas~θæŋ is~θaa ʔæhœʔ maj is~θaa taʔitol ila raj a korkoriŋ a ka a aʔβaaʔ βaβaw s~θaʔœwaz~ð.
S.TRANSL: 那狗坐下,並爬上小孩的肩膀.
"The dog sat down and climbed on top of the child's shoulder."

S.FORM: hini koSa'en ka wae'ae' haysia isaa rison ray a kokool babaw.
S.PHON: hini koʃaʔən ka wæʔæʔ hajs~θia is~θaa ris~θon raj a kokool βaβaw.
S.FORM: hini koSa'en ka wae'ae' haysia isaa rison ray a kokool babaw.
S.PHON: hini koʃaʔən ka wæʔæʔ hajs~θia is~θaa ris~θon raj a kokool βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: "The deer was still on top of the mountain."

S.FORM: moehae'oe mwai' nakhara maybih ila koSa.
S.PHON: mœhæʔœ mwaiʔ nakhara majβih ila koʃa.
S.FORM: moehae'oe mwai' nakhara maybih ila koSa.
S.PHON: mœhæʔœ mwaiʔ nakhara majβih ila koʃa.
S.TRANSL: 牠下來並且很後悔,並且說,
"It came down and regretted it. And said,"

S.FORM: wa a nak'ino'an ila.
S.PHON: wa a nakʔinoʔan ila.
S.FORM: wa a nak'ino'an ila.
S.PHON: wa a nakʔinoʔan ila.

S.FORM: mwai' koSa'en ray hinolaong langi'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ koʃaʔən raj hinolaoŋ laŋiʔ.
S.FORM: mwai' koSa'en ray hinolaong langi'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ koʃaʔən raj hinolaoŋ laŋiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們來到蔭涼的這一邊.
"They came to the side of a shady spot."

S.FORM: kita'en ila hiza ka 'atabai isa hiza 'aehoe' a ma lalangoy nakhara tbong.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ila hiz~ða ka ʔataβai is~θa hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ a ma lalaŋoj nakhara tβoŋ.
S.FORM: kita'en ila hiza ka 'atabai isa hiza 'aehoe' a ma lalangoy nakhara tbong.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ila hiz~ða ka ʔataβai is~θa hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ a ma lalaŋoj nakhara tβoŋ.

S.FORM: isaa noka a korkoring koSa'en 'iyahimi'.
S.PHON: is~θaa noka a korkoriŋ koʃaʔən ʔijahimiʔ.
S.FORM: isaa noka a korkoring koSa'en 'iyahimi'.
S.PHON: is~θaa noka a korkoriŋ koʃaʔən ʔijahimiʔ.
S.TRANSL: "The child told the dog to be quiet."

S.FORM: 'izik tobong.
S.PHON: ʔiz~ðik toβoŋ.
S.FORM: 'izik tobong.
S.PHON: ʔiz~ðik toβoŋ.

S.FORM: ta'itol lasia nakhini koSa'en ka 'atabai babaw.
S.PHON: taʔitol las~θia nakhini koʃaʔən ka ʔataβai βaβaw.
S.FORM: ta'itol lasia nakhini koSa'en ka 'atabai babaw.
S.PHON: taʔitol las~θia nakhini koʃaʔən ka ʔataβai βaβaw.

TRANSL.notes: 他們(爬)上那木頭的頂端.

S.TRANSL: 他們 上那木頭的頂端.
"They climbed on top of a dead wood."

S.FORM: rima' moehae'oe isaa kiim ka a takem.
S.PHON: rimaʔ mœhæʔœ is~θaa kiim ka a takəm.
S.FORM: rima' moehae'oe isaa kiim ka a takem.
S.PHON: rimaʔ mœhæʔœ is~θaa kiim ka a takəm.
S.TRANSL: "The child looked down to look for the frog."

S.FORM: mwai' sa'oewaz kitaen ila ray 'atabai hikor ka takem roSa'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ s~θaʔœwaz~ð kitæn ila raj ʔataβai hikor ka takəm roʃaʔ.
S.FORM: mwai' sa'oewaz kitaen ila ray 'atabai hikor ka takem roSa'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ s~θaʔœwaz~ð kitæn ila raj ʔataβai hikor ka takəm roʃaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他看到兩隻青蛙在那塊木頭後面.
"He saw two frogs behind the dead piece of wood."

S.FORM: hiza 'aehoe' iya iyanoa' 'aehoe' ki ki korkoring.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ ija ijanoaʔ ʔæhœʔ ki ki korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: hiza 'aehoe' iya iyanoa' 'aehoe' ki ki korkoring.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ ija ijanoaʔ ʔæhœʔ ki ki korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: "What's wrong with the dog and the child?"

S.FORM: mwai' kabih naehaen langi.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ kaβih næhæn laŋi.
S.FORM: mwai' kabih naehaen langi.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ kaβih næhæn laŋi.

S.FORM: 'akoy 'atomalan ila kitaen ka a takem.
S.PHON: ʔakoj ʔatomalan ila kitæn ka a takəm.
S.FORM: 'akoy 'atomalan ila kitaen ka a takem.
S.PHON: ʔakoj ʔatomalan ila kitæn ka a takəm.

S.FORM: lasia isaa masaeng ri'saon naehaen ray 'atabai babaw.
S.PHON: las~θia is~θaa mas~θæŋ riʔs~θaon næhæn raj ʔataβai βaβaw.
S.FORM: lasia isaa masaeng ri'saon naehaen ray 'atabai babaw.
S.PHON: las~θia is~θaa mas~θæŋ riʔs~θaon næhæn raj ʔataβai βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 牠們坐在那塊木頭上面.
"They were sitting on top of the dead piece of wood."

S.FORM: isahini ka a korkoring ma a rakep tasihoeroe ila naehaen kayzaeh ka a takem.
S.PHON: is~θahini ka a korkoriŋ ma a rakəp tas~θihœrœ ila næhæn kajz~ðæh ka a takəm.
S.FORM: isahini ka a korkoring ma a rakep tasihoeroe ila naehaen kayzaeh ka a takem.
S.PHON: is~θahini ka a korkoriŋ ma a rakəp tas~θihœrœ ila næhæn kajz~ðæh ka a takəm.
S.TRANSL: 現在小孩捉 ... .找到他的青蛙.
"Now the child caught... , found his frog."

S.FORM: hiza 'ima a langoy sowiti ray hinolaong.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔima a laŋoj s~θowiti raj hinolaoŋ.
S.FORM: hiza 'ima a langoy sowiti ray hinolaong.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔima a laŋoj s~θowiti raj hinolaoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 因此會有一些青蛙在那蔭涼處游泳.
"So there will be fewer frogs swimming in the shady area."

S.FORM: 'iya ralomen sa'oewaz ila isahiza ka a korkoring ma.
S.PHON: ʔija ralomən s~θaʔœwaz~ð ila is~θahiz~ða ka a korkoriŋ ma.
S.FORM: 'iya ralomen sa'oewaz ila isahiza ka a korkoring ma.
S.PHON: ʔija ralomən s~θaʔœwaz~ð ila is~θahiz~ða ka a korkoriŋ ma.

S.FORM: siska hiza 'ima haebaeaen naehaen koSa'en ka takem nakhara papil'awan ila.
S.PHON: s~θis~θka hiz~ða ʔima hæβææn næhæn koʃaʔən ka takəm nakhara papilʔawan ila.
S.FORM: siska hiza 'ima haebaeaen naehaen koSa'en ka takem nakhara papil'awan ila.
S.PHON: s~θis~θka hiz~ða ʔima hæβææn næhæn koʃaʔən ka takəm nakhara papilʔawan ila.
S.TRANSL: "The child bade farewell to the group of frogs."

S.FORM: hayza ka hima' wilah sowiti ka hima'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ka himaʔ wilah s~θowiti ka himaʔ.
S.FORM: hayza ka hima' wilah sowiti ka hima'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ka himaʔ wilah s~θowiti ka himaʔ.
